title: Maya
html:
Yahir's older sister (likely) — long-standing family-side oracle / call-frequency anchor across the corpus. Functions in two distinct registers: (1) the 2019 dad-death oracle ("ask Maya where my father went wrong"), and (2) the 2023–2025 weekly-check-in fixture ("call maya" recurring in todos). One of the few family entities Yahir actively maintains contact with through every life-stage.

TL;DR

  • 19 inbound citations spanning 2019 → 2026 — sustained across 7 years.
  • The "Maya as oracle" moment in 2019 is load-bearing for the entire lineage as fate thread — Yahir explicitly extracts the dad-failure-mode diagnostic from her (2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong, 2019 10 31 before i forget i ask maya where my father went wrong she re).
  • Recurring "call maya" in 2023–2025 todos (2025 05 30 todos, 2023 09 05 todo 82423) — relationship-maintenance through frequency.
  • Featured in family planning (2025 06 22 wedding list for now) and graduation ritual (2025 05 13 for graduation) — Maya is on the witness list.
  • Surfaces in crisis adjacency — 2022 03 01 crisis hotline numbers suggests Yahir keeps her in the support-network loop.
  • The "why mom + maya + jann + brenda + dad" reflection (2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad) explicitly inventories Maya alongside mom + scholarship-mentor jann + brenda aguilera + dad — the inner circle.

Key facts

  • Dad-death oracle. 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong is the canonical moment — Yahir asks Maya for the structural diagnosis of his father's failures.
  • Premonition-cluster co-witness. 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition places Maya in the dad-death pre-event timeline.
  • 2021 financial-decision adjacency. 2021 04 27 crypto internship earning / 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos — Maya in the early money-and-school logistics.
  • Spring break and travel logistics. 2023 03 29 plans for spring break — co-travel.
  • Wedding planning. 2025 06 22 wedding list for now — Maya on the witness list.
  • Graduation rite. 2025 05 13 for graduation.
  • 2026 IDA accounts. 2026 01 09 ida account meta — financial-account context.

Source summaries

  • 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong — load-bearing oracle moment
  • 2019 10 31 before i forget i ask maya where my father went wrong she re
  • 2025 05 30 todos — recent recurring contact
  • 2023 09 05 todo 82423
  • 2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad — inner-circle inventory
  • 2025 06 22 wedding list for now
  • 2025 05 13 for graduation
  • 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition
  • 2019 12 12 talk to brenda
  • 2026 01 09 ida account meta

Plus ~9 additional crisis / financial / planning summaries.

Connections

  • mom yahir · dad yahir · yahir family — family unit
  • brenda aguilera · jann — co-mentioned inner-circle figures
  • lineage as fate · narcissist father as mirror · dad death premonitions — thread Maya anchors
  • bridge income strategies · 529 college savings plan — financial-context concepts
  • corvallis or — geographic context
  • people across multiple projects (query) — surfaces this entity
